TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == ťÉ®ŤźĹś¶āś≥ĀŤąášĹćÁĹģ == qalang na Tranan ga,kki'an na squliq Tayal,smsun squ gaga ru pincbaqan na qnxan Tayal,ini iyal wahiy pcyaqih na pmrruw zyuwaw kbayun ,nanu qu rhizyal qyunam,inkyasan hlahuy ga mtasaw kinbalay betunux ,giwal nqu qqalang betunux minnanak iyat hmtan pkton na rhzyal.yasa qu tepucig min'zyu be thaqan na qalanq,maki sa yatux balau qu dong mstranan,maki hazi 106.3188 mpayat hkuy kore kinslabang nya ru 600 meta kinwagiq nya spngan kahul babaw bsilung umi',spiyang zzik na qalanq Ulay. Pinqzwan nqu mrhuw ta Yawi.Puna' ga,kahul kinhulan lkotas ta pinsbkan, ru magan squ kinqoyat bniq na Lkbuta lru rasun nya kwara cinngasal nya si pkrayas squ hlahuy,mintehuk squ qalang mstranan qani ,qsu'un nya psurux qalang beh gong cyaqung qasa, yasa qu qsu balay maki qalang beh yatux na llyung mstranan la,,baqaw ta kawas 1730 hazi mwah min'izyu sqani.suruw ryax nasa ga, ktan nha talagay pizyux qqulih Tayal si qopu' mutu' babaw na qsya llyung ru cingay balay qsinuw nyux mhmut mlata' mqyanux beh syaw gong ru rrgyax,pqasun balay inlungan nya mrhuw Yawi.Puna' ini naga kzinga nya musa kmayal mrhuw krahu kinholan nqu Lkbuta,pqutan nya Yawi.Puna' qenu qasa ? nanu lalu na? si knguray mnglung kmal qu Yawi.Puna' mha: trang ryax nasa ga ‚Ä¶..trang ‚Ä¶ini nya baqi lalu nya ,iyat nya pnongan ana qutux uzi, nanu yasa si piray hmali nya mrhuw Lkbuta' mha: mstranan ,twangan nya an suruw trang lga lalu na Tayal" tranan " mha la,ana musa qalang inu qalang Tayal ga ,pqzyu' squ qalang mtranan ga misuw balay llungun nha rhzyal na hbuyaw qquliq Tayal ru qsinuw qnhyun nqu mblaq qqoyat na qalang ,mwah squ tlelu mlahang lga "xusan song"son nha la, ana betaq soni qu lalu na qalang la. qalang mstranan ga n_gyut hbuyaw squliq mqyanux lga,musa mgayang psgagay hkangi giqas na qyunam,cyugan kbhul kawas wayal ga kahul sa qalang na Takasan Toyeng mkrayas bbu' na lupi mbziq mhkangi kakay tehuk sqaniru kbalay qalanq kki'an,ini bsyaq qu phbuyaw squliq na qalang ru rasun nya pqasuw llaqi na musa pkbalay nanaq qu qqalang kki'an nhamaki zmagan qu llaqi nya Yawi.Puna' mtasaw balay inlungan nharu smsun balay kinbaqan nqu lkotas kwara nha.tun nya llaqi si lgluw llyung mstrnan mbziq musa hkzngi 'san nha qalalang nanaq,yasa qu qsuyan laqi maray ga sbilung qalang kwara cingasal nya,te sazing laqi Tana ga ptqalang beh Rahaw;te cyugan laqi Iban ga qalang squ Ulay;te mpayat laqi ga musa ptqalang kraga;te zmzgan laqi ga ptqalang nqu Kayu'(Tampya),squliq na Tayal qani ga,si tryax mgluw llyung mstranan mbziq musa mlata tqulih ru qmalup,metaq qu gong talah ru mbiq squ llyung mintehuh rhzyal na bnka' ru bsilung na benux lupi' mblaq balay mqyanux squ qsahuy na qyunam bniq ni lkotas,kyopan ta na kmukan minkahul cinbwanan na thelu lga ,si ta ryax mciraq pqqun rhzyal qnxun,ana gipun mwah klahang ita Taywan na ga si pciriq pkkyut krryax,nanu I kblayun nya qiway qqhoniq qu qes na Tayal ki kmukan lru yasa ini pciriq pkkut la,maki b'nux na qnahan Tayal qu ksu' (Pyasan.Maray)qu tayal,nanu I syan nha muci Tayal na ubuy Ksyu' lpi. Ryax nasa ga musa hazi maki kbhul zmiman squliq na kya,baha hmswa maki qwang iyal nqu qalang sa ru ini nbah phtuw qalang,si muku mqumah ru mlata hlahuy qnxan nha kwara squliq qalang,baqaw ta aring kawas minkoku 70 ga,qalanq kyahu ga,t'aring prmuruw zyuwaw na lmosay hlahuy,phluzyun nha cingay be squliq hogan mwah qalang rgyax,gyahan nha blihul qalang mwah mkal ru mangay mblaq na ktal betunux na qqsya' ki hlahuy la,squliq na kmkukan lga cingay uzi mwah pbaziy ru 'myuw qeqaya' na Tayal,kruma kmukan lga n_gyut mwah tmwang maki sqani uzi la Kirsto Kyokay ru Tensukyo. qalang Tranan ga maki nyux msyobay na wahan gmzuy tbasaw na okyak;wahan maniq blaq na nniqun hlahuy wahan mhngaw m'abi, ru wahan mqbaq gaga tayal ka cinringan mze'a nqu lubuw tminun cinrngan.mqumah na rramat nniqun lpyung hogan, pbaziy pinbahu hiya ga ungat iyu' na szyon mwah mani okyak ,ana ga knalay nha nniqun nya hekil ru qwaw trakis ru tqenuw tnahuk nha ali'rima ki ayanq ga s'utux nha baly maniq , spiyang na smya' mwah mbaziy lpyung hogan la. mzyup ta qalang Ulay ru hnasun ta tuqi usa mpiray hlahuy ru si lgluw musa qalang Rahaw mrkyas qmzit turuy musa ru baqaw ta 12 kore hazi stwahiq lga ptehuk qalang mtranana la. Te qutux: koyeng kperay,maki sqi yatux na gong mtranan cingay pphpah syaw tuqi ru mtasaw qsya' gong, tehuk ryax 'bagan lga ,khmay be okyak mwah n'os tmnga, lmosay sqani. Te sazing: hkngyan tuqi usa qalang giran Lompya ru usa toying, qalang na balung,mtmalam lhbaw qsilq na mkal tuqi hkngyan ,tuqi na p'agan squliq sraral. Te cyugan:ska na tlingay qalang ga cyux pira i mniqan ru wahan mhngaw m'abi'hngawan,ru psluy pbiran qqaya'hlahuy. Te mpayat:yatux na qalang cyux kya macyapaw ki syawme pqniqan ru p'byal wahan mhngaw lmosay,maki balay lhbaw mhhwah usuw qsliq inlungan squliq ki! šļĆ, .
S.PHON: == ******* == qalaŇč na tranan …£a,kki Ēan na s~…ēquliq tajal,s~…ēms~…ēun s~…ēqu …£a…£a ru pin ¶~ ®ő≤aqan na qnxan tajal,ini ijal wańßij p ¶~ ®jaqińß na pmrruw zjuwaw kő≤ajun ,nanu qu rńßizjal qjunam,inkjas~…ēan ńßlańßuj …£a mtas~…ēaw kinő≤alaj ő≤etunux ,…£iwal nqu qqalaŇč ő≤etunux minnanak ijat ńßmtan pkton na rńßzjal.jas~…ēa qu tepu ¶~ ®i…£ min Ēzju ő≤e tńßaqan na qalanq,maki s~…ēa jatux ő≤alau qu *oŇč ms~…ētranan,maki ńßazi ***.**** mpajat ńßkuj kore kins~…ēlaő≤aŇč nja ru *** meta kinwa…£iq nja s~…ēpŇčan kańßul ő≤aő≤aw ő≤s~…ēiluŇč umi Ē,s~…ēpijaŇč zzik na qalanq ulaj. pinqzwan nqu mrńßuw ta jawi.puna Ē …£a,kańßul kinńßulan lkotas~…ē ta pins~…ēő≤kan, ru ma…£an s~…ēqu kinqojat ő≤niq na lkő≤uta lru ras~…ēun nja kwara ¶~ ®inŇčas~…ēal nja s~…ēi pkrajas~…ē s~…ēqu ńßlańßuj,minteńßuk s~…ēqu qalaŇč ms~…ētranan qani ,qs~…ēu Ēun nja ps~…ēurux qalaŇč ő≤eńß …£oŇč ¶~ ®jaquŇč qas~…ēa, jas~…ēa qu qs~…ēu ő≤alaj maki qalaŇč ő≤eńß jatux na lljuŇč ms~…ētranan la,,ő≤aqaw ta kawas~…ē **** ńßazi mwańß min Ēizju s~…ēqani.s~…ēuruw rjax nas~…ēa …£a, ktan nńßa tala…£aj pizjux qqulińß tajal s~…ēi qopu Ē mutu Ē ő≤aő≤aw na qs~…ēja lljuŇč ru ¶~ ®iŇčaj ő≤alaj qs~…ēinuw njux mńßmut mlata Ē mqjanux ő≤eńß s~…ējaw …£oŇč ru rr…£jax,pqas~…ēun ő≤alaj inluŇčan nja mrńßuw jawi.puna Ē ini na…£a kziŇča nja mus~…ēa kmajal mrńßuw krańßu kinńßolan nqu lkő≤uta,pqutan nja jawi.puna Ē qenu qas~…ēa ? nanu lalu na? s~…ēi kŇčuraj mŇčluŇč kmal qu jawi.puna Ē mńßa: traŇč rjax nas~…ēa …£a *..traŇč *ini nja ő≤aqi lalu nja ,ijat nja pnoŇčan ana qutux uzi, nanu jas~…ēa s~…ēi piraj ńßmali nja mrńßuw lkő≤uta Ē mńßa: ms~…ētranan ,twaŇčan nja an s~…ēuruw traŇč l…£a lalu na tajal" tranan " mńßa la,ana mus~…ēa qalaŇč inu qalaŇč tajal …£a ,pqzju Ē s~…ēqu qalaŇč mtranan …£a mis~…ēuw ő≤alaj lluŇčun nńßa rńßzjal na ńßő≤ujaw qquliq tajal ru qs~…ēinuw qnńßjun nqu mő≤laq qqojat na qalaŇč ,mwańß s~…ēqu tlelu mlańßaŇč l…£a "xus~…ēan s~…ēoŇč"s~…ēon nńßa la, ana ő≤etaq s~…ēoni qu lalu na qalaŇč la. qalaŇč ms~…ētranan …£a n…£jut ńßő≤ujaw s~…ēquliq mqjanux l…£a,mus~…ēa m…£ajaŇč ps~…ē…£a…£aj ńßkaŇči …£iqas~…ē na qjunam, ¶~ ®ju…£an kő≤ńßul kawas~…ē wajal …£a kańßul s~…ēa qalaŇč na takas~…ēan tojeŇč mkrajas~…ē ő≤ő≤u Ē na lupi mő≤ziq mńßkaŇči kakaj teńßuk s~…ēqaniru kő≤alaj qalanq kki Ēan,ini ő≤s~…ējaq qu pńßő≤ujaw s~…ēquliq na qalaŇč ru ras~…ēun nja pqas~…ēuw llaqi na mus~…ēa pkő≤alaj nanaq qu qqalaŇč kki Ēan nńßamaki zma…£an qu llaqi nja jawi.puna Ē mtas~…ēaw ő≤alaj inluŇčan nńßaru s~…ēms~…ēun ő≤alaj kinő≤aqan nqu lkotas~…ē kwara nńßa.tun nja llaqi s~…ēi l…£luw lljuŇč ms~…ētrnan mő≤ziq mus~…ēa ńßkzŇči Ēs~…ēan nńßa qalalaŇč nanaq,jas~…ēa qu qs~…ēujan laqi maraj …£a s~…ēő≤iluŇč qalaŇč kwara ¶~ ®iŇčas~…ēal nja,te s~…ēaziŇč laqi tana …£a ptqalaŇč ő≤eńß rańßaw;te ¶~ ®ju…£an laqi iő≤an …£a qalaŇč s~…ēqu ulaj;te mpajat laqi …£a mus~…ēa ptqalaŇč kra…£a;te zmz…£an laqi …£a ptqalaŇč nqu kaju Ē(tampja),s~…ēquliq na tajal qani …£a,s~…ēi trjax m…£luw lljuŇč ms~…ētranan mő≤ziq mus~…ēa mlata tqulińß ru qmalup,metaq qu …£oŇč talańß ru mő≤iq s~…ēqu lljuŇč minteńßuńß rńßzjal na ő≤nka Ē ru ő≤s~…ēiluŇč na ő≤enux lupi Ē mő≤laq ő≤alaj mqjanux s~…ēqu qs~…ēańßuj na qjunam ő≤niq ni lkotas~…ē,kjopan ta na kmukan minkańßul ¶~ ®inő≤wanan na tńßelu l…£a ,s~…ēi ta rjax m ¶~ ®iraq pqqun rńßzjal qnxun,ana …£ipun mwańß klańßaŇč ita tajwan na …£a s~…ēi p ¶~ ®iriq pkkjut krrjax,nanu i kő≤lajun nja qiwaj qqńßoniq qu qes~…ē na tajal ki kmukan lru jas~…ēa ini p ¶~ ®iriq pkkut la,maki ő≤ Ēnux na qnańßan tajal qu ks~…ēu Ē (pjas~…ēan.maraj)qu tajal,nanu i s~…ējan nńßa mu ¶~ ®i tajal na uő≤uj ks~…ēju Ē lpi. rjax nas~…ēa …£a mus~…ēa ńßazi maki kő≤ńßul zmiman s~…ēquliq na kja,ő≤ańßa ńßms~…ēwa maki qwaŇč ijal nqu qalaŇč s~…ēa ru ini nő≤ańß pńßtuw qalaŇč,s~…ēi muku mqumańß ru mlata ńßlańßuj qnxan nńßa kwara s~…ēquliq qalaŇč,ő≤aqaw ta ariŇč kawas~…ē minkoku ** …£a,qalanq kjańßu …£a,t ĒariŇč prmuruw zjuwaw na lmos~…ēaj ńßlańßuj,pńßluzjun nńßa ¶~ ®iŇčaj ő≤e s~…ēquliq ńßo…£an mwańß qalaŇč r…£jax,…£jańßan nńßa ő≤lińßul qalaŇč mwańß mkal ru maŇčaj mő≤laq na ktal ő≤etunux na qqs~…ēja Ē ki ńßlańßuj la,s~…ēquliq na kmkukan l…£a ¶~ ®iŇčaj uzi mwańß pő≤azij ru Ēmjuw qeqaja Ē na tajal,kruma kmukan l…£a n…£jut mwańß tmwaŇč maki s~…ēqani uzi la kirs~…ēto kjokaj ru tens~…ēukjo. qalaŇč tranan …£a maki njux ms~…ējoő≤aj na wańßan …£mzuj tő≤as~…ēaw na okjak;wańßan maniq ő≤laq na nniqun ńßlańßuj wańßan mńßŇčaw m Ēaő≤i, ru wańßan mqő≤aq …£a…£a tajal ka ¶~ ®inriŇčan mze Ēa nqu luő≤uw tminun ¶~ ®inrŇčan.mqumańß na rramat nniqun lpjuŇč ńßo…£an, pő≤azij pinő≤ańßu ńßija …£a uŇčat iju Ē na s~…ēzjon mwańß mani okjak ,ana …£a knalaj nńßa nniqun nja ńßekil ru qwaw trakis~…ē ru tqenuw tnańßuk nńßa ali Ērima ki ajanq …£a s~…ē Ēutux nńßa ő≤alj maniq , s~…ēpijaŇč na s~…ēmja Ē mwańß mő≤azij lpjuŇč ńßo…£an la. mzjup ta qalaŇč ulaj ru ńßnas~…ēun ta tuqi us~…ēa mpiraj ńßlańßuj ru s~…ēi l…£luw mus~…ēa qalaŇč rańßaw mrkjas~…ē qmzit turuj mus~…ēa ru ő≤aqaw ta ** kore ńßazi s~…ētwańßiq l…£a pteńßuk qalaŇč mtranana la. te qutux: kojeŇč kperaj,maki s~…ēqi jatux na …£oŇč mtranan ¶~ ®iŇčaj ppńßpańß s~…ējaw tuqi ru mtas~…ēaw qs~…ēja Ē …£oŇč, teńßuk rjax Ēő≤a…£an l…£a ,kńßmaj ő≤e okjak mwańß n Ēos~…ē tmŇča, lmos~…ēaj s~…ēqani. te s~…ēaziŇč: ńßkŇčjan tuqi us~…ēa qalaŇč …£iran lompja ru us~…ēa tojiŇč, qalaŇč na ő≤aluŇč,mtmalam lńßő≤aw qs~…ēilq na mkal tuqi ńßkŇčjan ,tuqi na p Ēa…£an s~…ēquliq s~…ēraral. te ¶~ ®ju…£an:s~…ēka na tliŇčaj qalaŇč …£a ¶~ ®jux pira i mniqan ru wańßan mńßŇčaw m Ēaő≤i ĒńßŇčawan,ru ps~…ēluj pő≤iran qqaja Ēńßlańßuj. te mpajat:jatux na qalaŇč ¶~ ®jux kja ma ¶~ ®japaw ki s~…ējawme pqniqan ru p Ēő≤jal wańßan mńßŇčaw lmos~…ēaj,maki ő≤alaj lńßő≤aw mńßńßwańß us~…ēuw qs~…ēliq inluŇčan s~…ēquliq ki! *, .
S.FORM: == ťÉ®ŤźĹś¶āś≥ĀŤąášĹćÁĹģ == qalang na Tranan ga,kki'an na squliq Tayal,smsun squ gaga ru pincbaqan na qnxan Tayal,ini iyal wahiy pcyaqih na pmrruw zyuwaw kbayun ,nanu qu rhizyal qyunam,inkyasan hlahuy ga mtasaw kinbalay betunux ,giwal nqu qqalang betunux minnanak iyat hmtan pkton na rhzyal.yasa qu tepucig min'zyu be thaqan na qalanq,maki sa yatux balau qu dong mstranan,maki hazi 106.3188 mpayat hkuy kore kinslabang nya ru 600 meta kinwagiq nya spngan kahul babaw bsilung umi',spiyang zzik na qalanq Ulay. Pinqzwan nqu mrhuw ta Yawi.Puna' ga,kahul kinhulan lkotas ta pinsbkan, ru magan squ kinqoyat bniq na Lkbuta lru rasun nya kwara cinngasal nya si pkrayas squ hlahuy,mintehuk squ qalang mstranan qani ,qsu'un nya psurux qalang beh gong cyaqung qasa, yasa qu qsu balay maki qalang beh yatux na llyung mstranan la,,baqaw ta kawas 1730 hazi mwah min'izyu sqani.suruw ryax nasa ga, ktan nha talagay pizyux qqulih Tayal si qopu' mutu' babaw na qsya llyung ru cingay balay qsinuw nyux mhmut mlata' mqyanux beh syaw gong ru rrgyax,pqasun balay inlungan nya mrhuw Yawi.Puna' ini naga kzinga nya musa kmayal mrhuw krahu kinholan nqu Lkbuta,pqutan nya Yawi.Puna' qenu qasa ? nanu lalu na? si knguray mnglung kmal qu Yawi.Puna' mha: trang ryax nasa ga ‚Ä¶..trang ‚Ä¶ini nya baqi lalu nya ,iyat nya pnongan ana qutux uzi, nanu yasa si piray hmali nya mrhuw Lkbuta' mha: mstranan ,twangan nya an suruw trang lga lalu na Tayal" tranan " mha la,ana musa qalang inu qalang Tayal ga ,pqzyu' squ qalang mtranan ga misuw balay llungun nha rhzyal na hbuyaw qquliq Tayal ru qsinuw qnhyun nqu mblaq qqoyat na qalang ,mwah squ tlelu mlahang lga "xusan song"son nha la, ana betaq soni qu lalu na qalang la. qalang mstranan ga n_gyut hbuyaw squliq mqyanux lga,musa mgayang psgagay hkangi giqas na qyunam,cyugan kbhul kawas wayal ga kahul sa qalang na Takasan Toyeng mkrayas bbu' na lupi mbziq mhkangi kakay tehuk sqaniru kbalay qalanq kki'an,ini bsyaq qu phbuyaw squliq na qalang ru rasun nya pqasuw llaqi na musa pkbalay nanaq qu qqalang kki'an nhamaki zmagan qu llaqi nya Yawi.Puna' mtasaw balay inlungan nharu smsun balay kinbaqan nqu lkotas kwara nha.tun nya llaqi si lgluw llyung mstrnan mbziq musa hkzngi 'san nha qalalang nanaq,yasa qu qsuyan laqi maray ga sbilung qalang kwara cingasal nya,te sazing laqi Tana ga ptqalang beh Rahaw;te cyugan laqi Iban ga qalang squ Ulay;te mpayat laqi ga musa ptqalang kraga;te zmzgan laqi ga ptqalang nqu Kayu'(Tampya),squliq na Tayal qani ga,si tryax mgluw llyung mstranan mbziq musa mlata tqulih ru qmalup,metaq qu gong talah ru mbiq squ llyung mintehuh rhzyal na bnka' ru bsilung na benux lupi' mblaq balay mqyanux squ qsahuy na qyunam bniq ni lkotas,kyopan ta na kmukan minkahul cinbwanan na thelu lga ,si ta ryax mciraq pqqun rhzyal qnxun,ana gipun mwah klahang ita Taywan na ga si pciriq pkkyut krryax,nanu I kblayun nya qiway qqhoniq qu qes na Tayal ki kmukan lru yasa ini pciriq pkkut la,maki b'nux na qnahan Tayal qu ksu' (Pyasan.Maray)qu tayal,nanu I syan nha muci Tayal na ubuy Ksyu' lpi. Ryax nasa ga musa hazi maki kbhul zmiman squliq na kya,baha hmswa maki qwang iyal nqu qalang sa ru ini nbah phtuw qalang,si muku mqumah ru mlata hlahuy qnxan nha kwara squliq qalang,baqaw ta aring kawas minkoku 70 ga,qalanq kyahu ga,t'aring prmuruw zyuwaw na lmosay hlahuy,phluzyun nha cingay be squliq hogan mwah qalang rgyax,gyahan nha blihul qalang mwah mkal ru mangay mblaq na ktal betunux na qqsya' ki hlahuy la,squliq na kmkukan lga cingay uzi mwah pbaziy ru 'myuw qeqaya' na Tayal,kruma kmukan lga n_gyut mwah tmwang maki sqani uzi la Kirsto Kyokay ru Tensukyo. qalang Tranan ga maki nyux msyobay na wahan gmzuy tbasaw na okyak;wahan maniq blaq na nniqun hlahuy wahan mhngaw m'abi, ru wahan mqbaq gaga tayal ka cinringan mze'a nqu lubuw tminun cinrngan.mqumah na rramat nniqun lpyung hogan, pbaziy pinbahu hiya ga ungat iyu' na szyon mwah mani okyak ,ana ga knalay nha nniqun nya hekil ru qwaw trakis ru tqenuw tnahuk nha ali'rima ki ayanq ga s'utux nha baly maniq , spiyang na smya' mwah mbaziy lpyung hogan la. mzyup ta qalang Ulay ru hnasun ta tuqi usa mpiray hlahuy ru si lgluw musa qalang Rahaw mrkyas qmzit turuy musa ru baqaw ta 12 kore hazi stwahiq lga ptehuk qalang mtranana la. Te qutux: koyeng kperay,maki sqi yatux na gong mtranan cingay pphpah syaw tuqi ru mtasaw qsya' gong, tehuk ryax 'bagan lga ,khmay be okyak mwah n'os tmnga, lmosay sqani. Te sazing: hkngyan tuqi usa qalang giran Lompya ru usa toying, qalang na balung,mtmalam lhbaw qsilq na mkal tuqi hkngyan ,tuqi na p'agan squliq sraral. Te cyugan:ska na tlingay qalang ga cyux pira i mniqan ru wahan mhngaw m'abi'hngawan,ru psluy pbiran qqaya'hlahuy. Te mpayat:yatux na qalang cyux kya macyapaw ki syawme pqniqan ru p'byal wahan mhngaw lmosay,maki balay lhbaw mhhwah usuw qsliq inlungan squliq ki! šļĆ, .
